meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalling
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to implement automated user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure client success and speed.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is often a lack of user momentum. By implementing a high-fidelity onboarding flow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you automate the 'aha!' moment. This reduces client churn, clarifies scope, and transforms your development process into a repeatable, high-value asset that ships faster every time.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, but the project remains a graveyard of half-baked features. You’ve been here before: trapped in the '90% done' purgatory where the client loses interest and the momentum dies. It isn't a lack of coding skill; it’s a failure of user orientation.

True mastery in freelance development isn't just about clean code—it’s about engineering the user's journey. By front-loading the value through sophisticated onboarding, you stop building features in a vacuum and start building products that stick. Let’s leverage modern AI tooling to automate the path from signup to success.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides immediate value to your client's user base.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition of this SaaS and map out the 3-step sequence required for a user to reach the first 'aha' moment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'document the user journey map based on the provided product requirements'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Create the structural components for a multi-step modal or interactive walkthrough.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight, headless onboarding component using React and Tailwind that handles state transitions for a 3-step user walkthrough.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --path /src/components/OnboardingFlow.tsx --ref 'use the generated Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Triggers
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding flow only triggers when the user is primed for action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom hook to track user engagement metrics and trigger the onboarding modal only after 30 seconds of inactivity or upon the second login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file /src/hooks/useOnboardingTrigger.ts --instruction 'implement logic for engagement-based triggering'

steps.title: Integrate Progress Persistence
steps.description: Don't annoy users by making them restart; save their onboarding progress to the DB.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase-compatible function to store onboarding completion status in the user profile table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create db migration for user_onboarding_status and update the profile service'

steps.title: Finalize and Stress Test
steps.description: Verify the flow under various edge cases to ensure a smooth client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the onboarding flow covering success, interruption, and re-entry scenarios.

pro_tips: Never build onboarding as a separate app; embed it as a state-managed layer within your existing dashboard to minimize DOM thrashing.
Use 'progressive disclosure'—reveal features only as the user demonstrates the need for them to prevent cognitive overload.
Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing a user through a flow they don't want is the fastest way to increase bounce rates.
Treat your onboarding copy as a UI element; keep it punchy, benefit-driven, and under 15 words per screen.
Use telemetry to track where users drop off in your onboarding and use Claude Code to iterate on that specific step every 48 hours.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, invite your client to test it, and gather feedback to refine the trigger points before the final production rollout.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects stall and start shipping software that clients actually love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
